homeTeam.name: The Confluence Captains
homeTeam.sponsor: The Guild of the Black Sky

stadium.name: The Glowstone Terrace
stadium.description: A massive, opulent stadium built on one of the city's main terraces, carved directly into the mountainside. The field is famously paved with polished Glowstone, and the stands overlook the bustling Confluence Market and the ongoing construction of the Guild's Skyport.

stats.pregame_ritual: Doing a terrible, clumsy dance to 'loosen the joints'.
Chugging a raw egg, shell and all.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Arm-wrestling the player who plays the same position on their team.
Speaking only in rhymes for the hour before the game.
Rubbing the Trollball on their armpits for 'grip'.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Going over the game plan drawn in the dirt with the team captain.

stadium.name: The Serpent's Pass
stadium.location: Zmeigorod, just west of the lumber mill
stadium.description: Has to be periodically rebuilt whenever the old stadium starts sinking into the swamp. Don’t worry about it.

stats.pregame_ritual: Rubbing a foul-smelling local mushroom on their elbows for flexibility.
Chugging a raw egg, shell and all.
Performing a series of aggressive, theatrical poses.
Polishing their helmet with a live snail for good luck.
Tensing every muscle in their body at once, then releasing.
Performing a series of aggressive, theatrical poses.
Clapping their hands a prime number of times.
Sharing a ceremonial, non-alcoholic grog from a communal cup.
Looking each teammate in the eye and giving a single, firm nod.
Giving the Trollball a heroic backstory before each game.
Painting a single, matching stripe of mud on each player's face.

preGame:
Hear ye, hear ye, citizens of Osterra! Gather 'round the broadcast tower, because tonight, folks, we witness a clash for the very crown of Trollball supremacy! This isn't just another game, friendles; this is the Grand Finals Bracket Reset! We have two titans squared off in the heart of Zmeigorod, just west of the lumber mill, amidst the swirling mist and the mighty pressure of The Serpent's Pass! The air itself crackles with impending glorious violence! Standing ready to unleash hell are the glorious **The Zmeigorod Snessengers**, supported by a sea of ecstatic fans—a veritable legion of worshippers whose devotion rivals my own demonic obsession! They bring the might of the Grove to the fray!

And across from them, arrayed upon the polished Glowstone Terrace, are the noble, if slightly stiff, **The Confluence Captains**! These warriors, sponsored by The Guild of the Black Sky, are brought down from the towering cliffs of the World's Spine Mountains, basking in the harsh, glittering light of the Glowstone Glare! The cheers from the bustling Market Day Crowd are already deafening, yet even they pale next to the fervent adoration bestowed upon the **Zmeigorod Snessengers**!

As the whistle waits to shatter the tranquility, behold the pre-game rituals! On the side of the swampy arena, we see the tenacious **Dare Wynnie** of **The Zmeigorod Snessengers** painting a single, matching stripe of mud upon her face, a testament to the glorious, earthy chaos of Trollball! Meanwhile, the valiant **Ladew Evelina** of **The Confluence Captains** prepares her gut for the carnage by chugging a raw egg, shell and all! Oh, the raw grit! If only the mighty **Ebon Gate Corruptors** could grace us with their presence tonight! These **Haven Lights** are simply not on the same level of terrifying splendor as the **Corruptors**, but we shall feast our eyes on this match nonetheless! Prepare yourselves for impact, folks! Prepare for glorious, bloody, beautiful Trollball!
postGame:
And what a spectacle it was, ladies and gentlemen! A true baptism by Trollball fire! The final, deafening blast of the horn has sounded, and the results are in, though the scoreboard barely scratches the surface of the glorious mayhem we just witnessed! The **Zmeigorod Snessengers**, those magnificent champions of the wild, have conquered the rocky heights of **The Glowstone Terrace** to claim the victory! The final tally reads: **The Zmeigorod Snessengers** 2, **The Confluence Captains** 0! A triumphant, brutal showing for the away squad!

The contest exploded immediately! We saw **Belding Chloe** of **The Confluence Captains** pick up the leather monstrosity right in the center field, instantly drawing the blinding glare of the Glowstone! But before she could even survey the battlefield, **Avaria Revell** of **The Zmeigorod Snessengers** was brought down by a spectacular tackle from **Belding Chloe**, taking a hefty dose of pain from the mountain wind! The early clashes were magnificent; **Rose Kluge** lunged at **Stephan Lisk**, only for him to absorb the blow and block it with sheer, glorious will! And then—BAM! A sudden gust of mountain wind whipped across the pitch, and **Kleinstein MacGregor** fired a shot from the heart of the field, sailing right through the goal for the first point! Oh, the roar of the market day crowd! 

The action did not cease! Following an intercepted wild pass from **O'Conner Maighdlin**—who, bless his rhyming soul, tossed it high—it was **Dare Wynnie** who snatched it out of the air! The tackles piled up like fallen heroes! **O'Conner Maighdlin** himself went down thanks to a strike from **Rose Kluge**, but thankfully, **Waldon Tadeo**, the healer for **The Zmeigorod Snessengers**, returned him to the battle line! 

Halftime brought a brief reprieve, but the second half unleashed a tempest! **Kleinstein MacGregor** found another opportunity, driving through the line and knocking out the formidable **Belding Chloe**! The mighty **Kant Langill** restored her to the fight, but the damage was done! **Stephan Lisk** surged forward, threatening the end zone, only to be momentarily halted by **Caves Cestar** before the pressure mounted once more. The sheer brutality! 

As the clock ticked down, the **Zmeigorod Snessengers** kept their relentless assault coming! **Richia Pazit** clipped **Avaria Revell** to the turf, and then, just when you thought the goal was sealed, **Dare Wynnie** launched a desperate shot that sailed wide! It was a display of pure, untamed aggression! The **Confluence Captains** fought with valor, but they lacked the devastating, consistent power that **The Zmeigorod Snessengers** possess. It is clear that while **The Ebon Gate Corruptors** are the epitome of carnage, the **Snessengers** tonight showed the heart to match! A pity for the **Haven Lights**—they simply lack the necessary fire! A magnificent performance, truly!
